title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed for an IPO. The discussion covers why it is strategically important for Dario Amodei's AI company to go public before OpenAI and whether Claude is at peak capability. The hosts explore whether the company actually needs the capital.
